archimate:WorkPackage.name: Work Package 3 - Fraud Detection & AML Real-time Platform
archimate:WorkPackage.documentation: Cakupan: Implementasi Kafka event streaming, pelatihan model ML fraud, dan integrasi dengan CBS baru. Durasi: 4 bulan (TW2-TW4) Prioritas: Tinggi Target Plateau: Target Architecture Menghasilkan: D3 - Fraud Detection & AML Engine Memicu: Fraud Real-time 100% Transaksi Menyelesaikan: GAP-4
